% Hand-drawn TikZ figure — collective bargaining as a feedback mechanism in the labor market.
% Edit freely — not generated by script.
\def\strKVFeedbackLoopCaption{Trh práce perspektivou vlády jako zpětnovazebního regulátora.}%
% Poster override (before \input this file):
%   \renewcommand\DPKVLoopBaseSize{\normalsize}
\providecommand\DPKVLoopBaseSize{\small}
%
\begin{figure}[H]
  \centering
  \begin{tikzpicture}[
    font=\sffamily\DPKVLoopBaseSize,
    every node/.style={align=center, inner sep=3pt,
      font=\linespread{0.92}\sffamily\DPKVLoopBaseSize\selectfont},
    block/.style       ={draw=black!85, rounded corners=3pt, fill=black!8,
                         text width=3.0cm, minimum height=1.35cm, line width=0.8pt},
    plant/.style       ={draw=black!85, rounded corners=3pt, fill=black!18,
                         text width=3.0cm, minimum height=1.45cm, line width=0.9pt},
    feedback/.style    ={draw=black!85, rounded corners=3pt, fill=white,
                         text width=2.5cm, minimum height=1.35cm, line width=0.8pt},
    sum/.style         ={circle, draw=black!85, fill=white, minimum size=7mm, line width=0.8pt},
    mainArrow/.style   ={->, line width=1.0pt, draw=black!85, >=Stealth},
    auxArrow/.style    ={->, dashed, line width=0.9pt, draw=black!85, >=Stealth},
    grayAux/.style     ={->, dashed, line width=0.9pt, draw=gray!70, >=Stealth},
    plainLine/.style   ={line width=1.0pt, draw=black!85},
    lbl/.style         ={font=\sffamily\DPKVLoopBaseSize, fill=white,
                          inner sep=1.5pt}, %
  ]
    % --- forward path (left to right) ---
    \node[sum] (sum) at (0,0) {};
    \node[block] (legislature) at (2.35,0) {Sociální dialog\\legislativa\\\textit{filtr dolní propust}};
    \node[plant] (system) at (6.1,0) {Tržní\\mechanismus\\\textit{rychlá dynamika}};
    \node[plant] (effects) at (9.8,-1.5) {Socioekonomický mechanismus\\\textit{pomalá dynamika}};
    \node[sum] (sesum) at (12.1,0) {$+$};
    \node[] (output) at (14.3,0) {};

    % --- reference input enters the summing junction from above ---
    \node[align=center] (goal) at (0,1.1)
      {Cíl};
    \draw[mainArrow] (goal) -- (sum.north);
    \node at (-0.6,0.55) {$+$};
    \node at (-0.6,-0.55) {$-$};

    \draw[mainArrow] (sum) -- (legislature);
    \draw[mainArrow] (legislature) -- (system); %node[lbl, above, text width=1.5cm] {podnikatelské\\prostředí} (system);
    \draw[mainArrow] (system) -- node[lbl, above, yshift=2pt] {Produkt} (sesum);
    \path (system.south |- effects.west) coordinate (welfare_elbow); % \draw[mainArrow] (system.south) |- node[lbl, below right] {Blahobyt} (effects.west); syntax not passing in pgfutil of main, extra path needed
      \node[lbl, below right] at ($(welfare_elbow)+(0.05,-0.05)$) {Blahobyt};
    \draw[mainArrow] (system.south) -- (welfare_elbow) -- (effects.west); %node[lbl, above, text width=1.5cm] {společenské\\prostředí} (effects);
    \path (effects.east -| sesum.south) coordinate (sesum_elbow);
    \draw[mainArrow] (effects.east) -- (sesum_elbow) -- (sesum.south);
    \draw[mainArrow] (sesum) -- node[lbl, above, yshift=2pt] {Výstup} (output);

    % --- external disturbance enters the plant from above ---
    \node (dist) at ($(system.north)+(0,1.6)$) {};
    \draw[auxArrow] (dist) -- node[lbl, above] {inflace, recese\\technologie, konkurence} (system.north);

    % --- feedback path (output back to the summing junction) ---
    \path ($(sesum)!0.5!(output)$) coordinate (fbtap);
    \path ($(system.south)+(0,-0.75)$) coordinate (setap);

    \node[feedback] (gov) at ($(setap)+(0,-2.25)$) {Stát / Vláda\\\textit{regulátor}};

    % Full feedback branch as two perpendicular arrows.
    \path (fbtap |- gov.east) coordinate (fb_elbow);
    \draw[mainArrow] (fbtap) -- (fb_elbow) -- (gov.east);
    \path (gov.west -| sum.south) coordinate (sum_elbow);
    \draw[mainArrow] (gov.west) -- (sum_elbow) -- (sum.south);

    % Additional grey dashed influence from socioeconomic conditions.
    \draw[grayAux] (setap) -- (gov.north);

    % Dashed influence from government to legislature.
    \draw[auxArrow] (gov.north) -- (legislature.south);

    % Additional dashed influence from judiciary/international legislation.
    \path ($(legislature.north)+(0,1.6)$) coordinate (lawdist);
    \draw[auxArrow] (lawdist) -- node[lbl, above] {soudnictví \\ \acs{EU}, \acs{ILO}} (legislature.north);
  \end{tikzpicture}
  \caption{\strKVFeedbackLoopCaption}
  \label{fig:kv_feedback_loop}
\end{figure}
